titleStmt.title: SII 7.1048: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1048. (A.R. No. 415 of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷertaru n=ta ṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarn tu ceṅko loccik karuṅkali kaṭin tu tan=ta yar tamai yaṉ ṟampiyar taṉ ṟirumain=ta ṉeṉ ṟivarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭik kaṉṉikāvalar teṉṉavar muvaril vāṉaka miruvaruk karuḷi kāṉaka moruvaṉuk kaḷittu
p porucilaic ceralaṉ velaikeḻu kān=ta ḷurccālai kalamaṟuppit tilaṅkaiyaṟ karaicaiyu malaṅkal vallavaṉaiyuṅ kanṉakucciyar kāvalaṉaiyum poṉṉaṇi muṭittalai taṭintu taṉ koṭippaṭai yevik kaṉṉāṭakar viṭu kaṭakari puraḷat taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ ṟamiḻp paraṇikoṇ ṭe(ṭ)āṉṉār vacciraneṭuvāḷ
viccayaṉ veruneḷit tañci yoṭat taṉ vañciyam paṭaiyā lāṅkavaṉ pitāvai mātāvoṭuñ catāmaliviṅku nīrppūṇṭur veñcamat takappaṭuttayappaṭai yākavamallaṉ payattoṭu varaviṭu moṟṟarai veruvarap piṭit tāṅkavar mārvilākavamallaṉ yāṅkaṇu mañciṉam(e)ṉaṉa naṉkeḻutic ceIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 7.1048 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
